description: §41.16 — `omit=["X", ...]` on `<tableFor for=T>` naming a field not present on struct `T` fires E-TABLEFOR-OMIT-INVALID-FIELD. `User` has `{ id, name }`; `omit=["nope"]` names a non-field. Mirror of E-FORMFOR-OMIT-INVALID-FIELD (§41.14) + E-SCHEMAFOR-OMIT-INVALID-FIELD (§41.15); twin of tablefor-pick-invalid-field. (Incidental W-PROGRAM-001 + W-STDLIB-SEED-FAILCLOSED co-fire; superset match.)
rationale: §41.16 E-TABLEFOR-OMIT-INVALID-FIELD: the `omit=[...]` attribute SHALL name only declared struct fields; an unknown name is rejected. Fix: correct or remove the invalid field name from the omit array.
